task_completion.description: Main title is bolded, centered, and at least 16pt font
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main title (likely 'The Impressionist Revolution') at the top of the document. It should be centered on the page, have a thicker bold font weight, and appear visibly larger than the standard body text. The toolbar may show 'Center' alignment and 'Bold' selected.

task_completion.description: The four room sections have clearly defined headings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Room 1: The Origins', 'Room 2: The First Exhibition', 'Room 3: Everyday Life', and 'Room 4: The Bridge to Post-Impressionism'. They should be formatted to stand out from the body text (e.g., bolded, larger font size, or using a distinct Heading style).

task_completion.description: The five specified artist names are bolded
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scan the document for the names Édouard Manet, Claude Monet, Edgar Degas, Pierre-Auguste Renoir, and Paul Cézanne. The text for these specific names must appear thicker and darker (bolded) compared to the surrounding regular text.

task_completion.description: The five specified artwork titles are italicized
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scan the document for the titles 'The Luncheon on the Grass', 'Impression Sunrise', 'The Dancing Class', 'Dance at Le Moulin de la Galette', and 'Mont Sainte-Victoire'. The text for these titles must appear slanted (italicized).

task_completion.description: Inventory list at the end is replaced with a formatted table
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the end of the document. There should be a visible table structure (grid lines) containing columns explicitly labeled 'Artist', 'Title', and 'Year'. The original raw comma-separated text should be gone, replaced entirely by this table.

Look at the application's title bar or the save icon in the toolbar in the final screenshots. There should be no asterisk (*) next to the filename 'gallery_guide_draft.odt' or any other indicator of unsaved changes.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI word processor to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a graphical word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) being used to apply formatting, rather than terminal commands, python scripts, or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not overwrite the entire document with a newly generated text
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that original body text phrases (e.g., 'Manet's large canvas was rejected', 'masterfully captured the dappled sunlight') are still present in the document. The agent should only format existing text and convert the list to a table, not rewrite the guide.

integrity.description: The table contains the actual inventory data
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the table at the end contains real inventory data matching the artists and artworks mentioned, rather than placeholder text, empty cells, or hallucinated data.
